title: Notice of Watson Street landside closure on Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The landside leg of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The landside leg of the Watson Street intersection on Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction between 18 September and 3 October 2025 (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The landside leg of the Watson Street intersection on Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction between 18 September and 3 October 2025 (weather permitting)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alternative routes to access Watson Str are via the Beach Boulevard East Intersection.","html":"Alternative routes to access Watson Str are via the Beach Boulevard East Intersection."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction. The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
